failure_modes: False positives due to temporary fluctuations in activity/sleep
Missing individuals with gradual declines not captured by delta values
Over-reliance on risk_hint without considering other factors
Bias towards certain demographics or locations
guardrails: Cross-validate risk_hint with activity and sleep delta values
Consider the individual's age and location when assessing risk
Avoid making assumptions based solely on risk_hint
Ensure fairness and avoid bias in the selection process
priority_signals: Age (older individuals may be more vulnerable)
planner_result.strategy: The LLM will analyze the candidate pool, prioritizing individuals with high risk hints and significant negative changes in activity and sleep patterns. The deterministic features will be used as supporting evidence to identify citizens with potentially declining well-being trajectories. The LLM will focus on identifying individuals whose activity and sleep patterns have worsened significantly, potentially indicating a decline in their overall health and well-being. The final decision will be made by the LLM, considering all available information.

ranked.reason: Highest negative sleep_delta (-49.00) combined with a high risk_hint (5.00) and a large negative activity_delta (-33.00) indicates a significant decline in well-being.
